title: sanguisorba sanguisorba var. delortii
intro: Sanguisorba sanguisorba var. delortii, also known as great burnet, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of great burnet include its ability to reduce bleeding and inflammation, making it a popular remedy for wound healing, digestive issues, and menstrual problems. In herbal preparations, great burnet can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
